terms.section1Text: Welcome to Fü-Mart! These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of our website and services. By accessing this website, you accept these terms in full.
terms.section2Text: Unless otherwise stated, Fü-Mart and/or its licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on this website. All intellectual property rights are reserved.
section3List: Publishing any website material in any other media.
Selling, sublicensing, and/or commercializing any website material.
Publicly performing and/or showing any website material without permission.
Using this website in any way that is or may be damaging to the website.
terms.section4Text: "Your Content" means any text, images, or other material you choose to display on this website. By displaying it, you grant Fü-Mart a non-exclusive, worldwide license to use, reproduce, and edit it.
terms.section5Text: This website is provided “as is,” with all faults, and Fü-Mart makes no express or implied representations or warranties of any kind.
terms.section6Text: In no event shall Fü-Mart, nor any of its officers or employees, be held liable for anything arising out of or in any way connected with your use of this website.
terms.section7Text: Fü-Mart reserves the right to revise these terms at any time as it sees fit, and by using this website you are expected to review these terms regularly.

privacy.section1Text: Fü-Mart is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit or use our website.
privacy.section2Intro: We may collect the following types of information:
section2List: Personal identification information (name, email address, etc.).
Usage data (pages visited, time spent, etc.).
privacy.section3Intro: Your data may be used to:
section3List: Send promotional communications and newsletters (with your consent).
Improve website functionality and user experience.
privacy.section4Text: Our website uses cookies to enhance your experience. You have the option to accept or decline cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.section5Text: We may use third-party services for analytics, marketing, and payment processing. These third parties are obligated to keep your data secure and confidential.
privacy.section6Text: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section7Text: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data. Please contact us if you wish to exercise any of these rights.
privacy.section8Text: Fü-Mart may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page, and we encourage you to review it regularly.
privacy.section9Text: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at fumart@yahoo.com.tw.
